chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.238 of 2023 Muhammad Sultan Versus Abdul Razaque Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 746/24 2. For orders on CMA 2386/23 3. For orders on office objection/reply at “A”. 4. For orders on CMA 2387/23 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For orders on CMA 2388/23 Dated: 30.04.2024 None for appellant. Mr. Abdul Qadir Leghari for respondent. -.-.- On 18.03.2024 the appellant’s counsel was not in attendance whereas on the following date he placed an application for consideration of this Court that is for withdrawal of his Vakalatnama. Notices were then issued directly to the appellant, although such notices were not required as it is duty of the appellant to pursue his matter notwithstanding the fact that he has reengaged a counsel or not, but he has remained absent not only on the last date but also today. It is also claimed that in substance it was suit for performance and with the consent of the plaintiff/appellant the amount was deposited and/or a consent order was passed. The appeal is also claimed to be barred by time. Nonetheless, it seems that the appellant has lost interest in the proceedings as not only Vakalatnama of the counsel is sought to be withdrawn but the appellant has also not appeared despite notice, though not required. In the circumstances, this High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
